mapper.select:
/** CmmtCodeGroup.selectList */ select
from cmmt_code_group where 1=1
and code_group like '%' || upper(#{codeGroup}) || '%'
and code_group_nm like '%' || upper(#{codeGroupNm}) || '%'

/** CmmtCodeGroupDao.select */ select
from cmmt_code_group where code_group = upper(#{codeGroup})
mapper.delete: /** CmmtCodeGroupDao.delete */ delete from cmmt_code_group where code_group = upper(#{codeGroup})
